subcodes.first_line: O Ḥamíd! The Lord of the world maketh mention of thee from within the Most Great Prison, and announceth unto thee that which hath been ordained for the chosen ones of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حمید یذکرک مولی العالم فی السجن الاعظم و یبشرک بما قدر لاصفیاء الله فی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @wisdom [hikmat]
